examples: Observe the effect of Sappan Wood on the levels of cell factor IL-2 and IL-6 in blood of rats with allogenic heart transplantion.
Purpose Observe the Cytotoxicity and induction of apoptosis effect of caesalpinia sappan Ethanol extract on the Human Lung Cancer A549 Cell.
Objective:To observe the effect of Sappan Wood on the levels of cell factor IL-2 and IL-6 in blood of rats with allogenic heart transplantion.
